text:
If tight chest is familiar, this anxiety pattern needs a better reset.

Try this. Press both feet into the floor, widen your gaze. And name five ordinary objects out loud. Keep it small enough to finish before your brain starts negotiating.

Bookmark the pattern. Signal, reset, next action. Physical orientation gives the mind a safer place to stand.
mediaAltText: Faceless vertical short on anxiety (broll + CosyVoice bank VO)
acceptance_layer: system working — Metricool dry-run only (not live publish)
